com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.led

Class LEDLight

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.led.LEDLight

  • public class LEDLight
extends java.lang.Object
    The class for setting led configurations of the contactless detection field on P300 devices.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      LEDLight() 
      LEDLight(int number, LEDColor color, LEDState state) 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      LEDColor getColor()
      Gets the color of the LED to be set.
      int getNumber()
      Gets the index of the LED to be set.
      LEDState getState()
      Gets the state of the LED to be set.
      void setColor(LEDColor color)
      Sets the color of the LED to be set.
      void setNumber(int number)
      Sets the index of the LED to be set.
      void setState(LEDState state)
      Sets the state of the LED to be set.

    • Method Detail

      • getNumber

        public int getNumber()
        Gets the index of the LED to be set.
        Returns:
        The index of the LED to be set.

      • setNumber

        public void setNumber(int number)
        Sets the index of the LED to be set.
        Parameters:
        number - The index of the LED to be set.

      • getColor

        public LEDColor getColor()
        Gets the color of the LED to be set.
        Returns:
        The color of the LED to be set. See LEDColor.

      • setColor

        public void setColor(LEDColor color)
        Sets the color of the LED to be set.
        Parameters:
        color - The color of the LED to be set. See LEDColor.

      • getState

        public LEDState getState()
        Gets the state of the LED to be set.
        Returns:
        The state of the LED to be set. See LEDState.

      • setState

        public void setState(LEDState state)
        Sets the state of the LED to be set.
        Parameters:
        state - The state of the LED to be set. See LEDState.
